src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Replaced javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Changed the controller return type from domain entity Book to DTO BookDto to decouple API response from internal domain model.
Removed redundant @Valid annotation from a primitive String parameter where it has no effect, relying on @NotBlank instead.
Added @Validated annotation to the controller class to enable Spring's method-level validation support.
Added Swagger/OpenAPI @Tag annotation to group endpoints under the 'books' tag in generated API documentation.
Replaced javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Moved exception class to a new package structure within the service layer.
Replaced direct domain entity usage in controller with dedicated DTOs for input and output.
Renamed service method to be more descriptive regarding the action performed.
Added Swagger/OpenAPI tag annotation to group endpoints in API documentation.
Replaced javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Replace the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 requirements.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.human_impl: public class ActuatorBasicSecurityConfig { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Update authorization configuration from the legacy authorizeRequests/antMatchers API to the new authorizeHttpRequests/requestMatchers lambda API.
Update HTTP Basic authentication configuration to use the new Customizer.withDefaults() pattern.
Update session management configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL.
Update CSRF disable configuration to use the new method reference pattern.
Inject WebEndpointProperties to dynamically resolve the actuator base path for security rules.
Refine security rules to explicitly permit health checks and restrict other actuator endpoints to ADMIN role.
Updated import path for the Books class to reflect a package restructuring from domain to service.dto.
Removed the throws Exception clause from the run method, likely because the implementation no longer throws checked exceptions or to align with cleaner interface usage.
Updated import path for the Books class to reflect a package restructuring from domain to service.dto.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.human_impl: Changed import from com.xpinjection.library.domain.Books to com.xpinjection.library.service.dto.Books

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Replaced javax.validation import with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/do.general_idea: Replaced javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/se.general_idea: Changed the return type of BookService methods from domain entity Book to DTO BookDto to decouple the service interface from the domain model.
Renamed the 'add' method to 'addExpert' and changed the parameter type from domain object 'Expert' to DTO 'CreateExpertDto' to align with service layer best practices.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/Lo.general_idea: Import Testcontainers support to enable containerized dependencies for local testing.
Define a nested TestConfiguration class to import runtime dependencies via Testcontainers.
Replace the manual StandaloneApplicationContextInitializer with the new RuntimeDependenciesConfiguration source.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Update import for LocalServerPort to reflect Spring Boot 3.0 package restructuring.
Remove explicit SpringExtension usage as it is auto-configured in JUnit 5 with Spring Boot 3.
Integrate Testcontainers into the test context using Spring Boot 3's ImportTestcontainers annotation.
Add Swagger API coverage reporting and OpenAPI spec export capabilities to the test base class.
Add Slf4j logging support via Lombok annotation.
Encapsulate RestAssured initialization and coverage filtering into a protected helper method.
